user_query: I'm writing a book on the benefits of humor in the workplace. Can you provide me with a quote about humor and a funny Chuck Norris joke to include in the book? Additionally, fetch jokes from the Jokes by API-Ninjas API to provide more examples of workplace humor.

TaskList.description: Fetch a funny Chuck Norris joke.
Fetch a collection of jokes from the Jokes by API-Ninjas API.
